reviews.review_description: The colors and music are nice and I like that you can switch between day and night. I wish there was a way to drive more slowly though, the car goes too fast in my opinion. Other than that, it’s a very basic experience with little to do and zero interaction.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!

In this app
UP/Down on the right stick.
You can adjust the speed of the car a little bit, but

However, it is not possible to adjust the speed of the car in detail.
I'm sorry to hear that.


We will use your feedback in our development!

Thank you very much for your review!

reviews.review_description:
Simple Relaxing Drive visualizer basically. I think this is a good app if you like to relax with a headset on. Throw this on and watch the traffic pass by for 5 mins as you reach a state of calm, lots of settings to change the speed and look up or down, plus 3 times of day. Not the best app ever but for free I like it.

Featured in Oculus Quest Seated Games Video - https://youtu.be/Naxha7wgbDQ

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!

I hope you like it. We are very happy to receive your review.
It's a great encouragement for us to develop the app.

Also, the Games video was very helpful.
Thank you very much!
